title: When setting memory limits, also set swap limits
body:
Closes #940

Changed to match expected behavior from Docker

comments.body:
The manpage already states that:
```
--memory-swap="LIMIT"
          A limit value equal to memory plus swap. Must be used with the  -m (--memory) flag. The swap LIMIT should always be larger than -m (--memory) value.  By default, the swap LIMIT will be set to
       double the value of --memory.
```

:pushpin: Commit 44840dd has been approved by `rhatdan`
